title: Cleric Trade Rotten To Emerald And Book 1:1
description: Player can trade with Cleric by using one Rotten Flesh to one Emerald or Book
body:
# Trade Rotten Flesh

Trade Rotten Flesh changes cleric villager trades so rotten flesh is more useful.

## What It Does

Cleric villagers can trade:

- `1 rotten flesh -> 1 emerald`
- `1 rotten flesh -> 1 book`

## Trade Behavior

New clerics should receive both rotten flesh trades.

Existing clerics may keep trades that were already generated before the mod was added. For consistent results, use a newly spawned cleric or a villager that becomes a cleric after the mod is loaded.
